subject: PennyAlpha Afternoon Watch — 2026-04-28
text:
Afternoon Watch — 2026-04-28

WATCHLIST FOR TOMORROW:
Nothing queued for tomorrow.

Screened 6 candidates: MDAI (RVOL 0.09x, dollar vol $120K — both below threshold), BZAI (RVOL 0.65x, no catalyst tonight/tomorrow), OABI (RVOL 0.78x, earnings May 7), RZLV (RVOL unconfirmed), RCAT ($11.80 — above ceiling), LOGC ($8.50 — above ceiling). No PDUFA on April 29 found in penny range.

These will be reviewed in tomorrow's 10:15 AM execution scan.
